name: Peanut Butter Oatmeal Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. Beat butter and sugar until fluffy. Add egg and vanilla; mix in peanut butter.
2. Stir together flour, baking soda, and salt. Mix in brown sugar, granulated sugar, oats, and chocolate chips.
3. Scoop dough by rounded tablespoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets.
4. Bake 8-9 minutes for chewy cookies or 10-11 minutes for crisp cookies.
5. Let cool on the sheet for 1 minute, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes approximately 4-1/2 dozen cookies.
